title: rubus iodes
intro: Rubus iodes, also known as the Himalayan raspberry, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the rose family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus iodes include lowering blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and acting as an antimicrobial agent, which can help prevent infections and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as tea, tincture, and extract, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
